text: Being here, I feel a strange calmness. The first space is quiet, almost meditative in its openness—yet the tilted perspective reminds me how easily my sense of place can be shifted. The second image, full of colors and the references to research and development, inspires curiosity. I feel like a wanderer in a space devoted to questioning, learning, and evolving. There is an undercurrent of excitement mixed with a gentle uncertainty, as if I am on the verge of new philosophical insights.
